limitations: No quantified AI investment amounts, headcount, or named AI programs disclosed in the excerpts; investment intensity scored 2 based on generic references to AI development in underwriting/pricing context.
AI narrative concreteness is limited — use cases are named (pricing precision, underwriting models, vendor evaluation) but no deployment status or metrics are provided.

Risk disclosure is company-specific with named mechanisms (regulatory impact on operations, pricing precision loss, competitive harm) but no quantification or named governance bodies, capping score at 4.
Equity market commentary referencing 'growth driven by AI' reflects macroeconomic observation, not company AI investment, and was excluded from scoring.
